description:
Create a dimensioned, orthographic top-down site plan image of a flat-roofed building with a solar array in SketchUp Make 2017. 

1. Model a rectangular flat-roofed building on the ground plane with dimensions 15 meters (length) × 10 meters (width), extruded to a reasonable height (e.g., 4-6 meters).
2. Use the Skelion plugin to place a solar panel array on the roof face.
3. Use the SketchUp Dimension Tool to add visible linear dimensions to the two main outer edges of the building (the 15m edge and the 10m edge). The dimension text must be visible.
4. Configure a technical view: Switch the Camera to 'Parallel Projection' (do not leave in Perspective), switch the standard view to 'Top', and use Zoom Extents so the building fills the view.
5. Export the 2D graphic as a PNG to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\site_plan.png'.
